item.title: Hardcoded API probe URLs in evolve/integrate/validate.ts
item.intent: Credential probe URLs have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No literal API base URLs appear in validate.ts.
item.description: src/evolve/integrate/validate.ts hardcodes three API probe endpoints as string literals: line 51 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models', line 66 'https://api.openai.com/v1/models', line 80 'https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/getMe' (template). These are the same pattern as BUG-025 (Ollama URL) and BUG-026 (WhatsApp Graph API) — probe endpoints hardcoded in one module with no single source of truth. Steps: (1) add ANTHROPIC_API_BASE='https://api.anthropic.com', OPENAI_API_BASE='https://api.openai.com', TELEGRAM_API_BASE='https://api.telegram.org' to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and replace the three string literals in validate.ts; (3) run evolve/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 4 files, ~6 lines changed. Same pattern as BUG-025/BUG-026.
